title: Infection Plants
description: Deadly plants that spread, infect, and consume your world. Fight back with flamethrowers, purifiers, and more!
body:
# 🌿 Infection Plants

**Your world is under threat.** Mysterious plants have emerged that spread relentlessly, infecting blocks and attacking anything that moves. Will you contain the outbreak... or unleash it?

## Four Deadly Plant Types

| Plant | Effect |
|-------|--------|
| **Normal** | Balanced spread, spawns infected villagers |
| **Acid** | Rapid spread, deals magic damage |
| **Lava** | Burns everything, emits light |
| **Ice** | Freezes and slows entities |

Each plant converts nearby blocks into infected terrain that continues spreading the corruption.

## Fight Back

- **Flamethrower** - Torch the infection with sustained fire
- **Purifier** - Cleanse infected areas (type-specific or universal)
- **Cure Potion** - Remove infection status from yourself
- **Gas Mask** - Wearable helmet that prevents infection
- **Infection Protector** - Place to create safe zones

## Weaponize the Infection

- **Infection Grenades** - Throw to spread chaos
- **Infected Arrows** - Shoot to infect enemies and spawn plants on impact

## Detection Tools

- **Infection Scanner** - Analyze infection levels in an area
- **Infection Detector** - Points toward the nearest infection

## Server Commands

```
/infection speed <1-100>  - Control spread rate
/infection pause/resume   - Toggle spreading
/infection clear <radius> - Emergency cleanup
```

## ⚠️ Warning

These plants WILL consume your world if left unchecked. Use responsibly... or don't.

**Made by Zeno Studios**
